creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

Sorry for late answer, I am on vacation for 2 more weeks.
 From here, I can hardly check, my Android does not host FreeBSD ;-)

I'll process once back.

Thanks

Brgrds

At 14:20 25/08/2012, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of security/squidclamav,
>
>Please note that PR ports/171022 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/171022
>
>--
>Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>edwin@FreeBSD.org
